vocabulary.example_sentence: We celebrate National Day at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在学校庆祝国庆节。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The party was a big surprise for Judy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这场派对给朱迪一个大惊喜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Buy something special for the celebration.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 为庆祝买点特别的东西。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Yogurt is on sale at a good price.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 酸奶特价出售，价格很实惠。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We need one kilo of chocolate for the list.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 清单上我们需要一千克巧克力。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Add yogurt and fruit to your shopping list.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把酸奶和水果加进购物清单。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The total price is twenty yuan.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 总价是二十元。

vocabulary.example_sentence: These balloons are at a good price.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这些气球价格很实惠。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Red balloons are symbols of celebration.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 红气球是庆祝的象征。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Chocolate pizza sounds surprising!
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 巧克力比萨听起来真惊喜！

vocabulary.example_sentence: We ordered pizza for the class party.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们为班级派对订了比萨。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Make a list before you go shopping.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 购物前先列清单。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Grow your own vegetables in the village.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在村里种你们自己的蔬菜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: For example, we blow out candles on birthdays.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 例如，生日时我们吹灭蜡烛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many symbols, for example balloons, mean joy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多象征，例如气球，表示欢乐。

vocabulary.example_sentence: English is an international language.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 英语是一门国际语言。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It is an international celebration this year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 今年是一场国际庆祝活动。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We mark National Day with a big celebration.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们用盛大庆典纪念国庆节。

vocabulary.example_sentence: National Day is a meaningful holiday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 国庆节是一个意义重大的节日。

vocabulary.example_sentence: People found ways to celebrate together.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 人们找到了一起庆祝的方式。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It was a meaningful celebration for everyone.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 对每个人来说都是一次有意义的庆祝。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Make a wish before you blow out the candles.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吹蜡烛前先许个愿。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The village holds a celebration every year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个村子每年都举办庆典。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Clark posted photos of the party online.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 克拉克把派对照片发到了网上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Contact Judy if you need help with the list.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 如果需要清单方面的帮助，联系朱迪。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The balloon is a symbol of joy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 气球是欢乐的象征。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Take a photo when we blow out the candles.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吹蜡烛时拍张照片。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They celebrate in a small village.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在一个小村庄里庆祝。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Children grow fast every year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 孩子们每年都长得很快。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Blow out the candles on the cake.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吹灭蛋糕上的蜡烛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We blow out candles and make a wish.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们吹灭蜡烛并许愿。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Enjoy the celebration with your friends.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 和朋友一起享受庆典。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mark your height on the wall each year.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每年在墙上标记你的身高。

vocabulary.example_sentence: See you later at the party.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 晚点派对见。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Next time we will celebrate at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 下次我们在学校庆祝。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Whom did you invite to the celebration?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你邀请了谁来参加庆典？

vocabulary.example_sentence: William Shakespeare is a famous writer in English.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 威廉·莎士比亚是英语文学著名作家。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Florence Nightingale is a meaningful national hero.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗洛伦斯·南丁格尔是一位意义重大的民族英雄。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We celebrate National Day in October.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在十月庆祝国庆节。

vocabulary.chinese: 中国共产党建党纪念日
vocabulary.example_sentence: CPC Founding Day is in July.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 中国共产党建党纪念日在七月。

vocabulary.chinese: 中国人民解放军建军节
vocabulary.example_sentence: PLA Day is on 1 August.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 中国人民解放军建军节在八月一日。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Judy bought balloons for the party.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 朱迪为派对买了气球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Clark enjoys the celebration with Judy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 克拉克和朱迪一起享受庆典。
